en-US.app.title: Settings
en-US.app.name: Settings
en-US.app.summary: Device, connectivity, audio, apps, hardware and updates
en-US.home.title: Settings
en-US.home.keyboard.title: On-screen keyboard
en-US.regional.title: Language & region
en-US.regional.note: Choose the interface language and device time zone
en-US.regional.language_hint: Change the Settings interface immediately and keep the choice for the next launch.
en-US.regional.timezone_hint: Updates the POSIX /etc/localtime link directly when the device permits it.
en-US.regional.timezone_reason_invalid_path: the localtime path is a directory
en-US.status.standalone: Standalone mode · no component event channel
en-US.status.audio_changed: Audio changed · open Audio to refresh
en-US.status.radio_changed: {radio} changed · refresh to see the latest state
en-US.system.title: System
en-US.system.note: Runtime, components, services and process isolation.
en-US.system.unavailable: MSYS service unavailable · local session details remain visible
en-US.system.roles_summary: {active} of {total} replaceable roles have an active provider
en-US.display.title: Display
en-US.display.note: Layout and outputs remain replaceable without coupling the shell to hardware.
en-US.display.logical_layout_note: Changes the shell layout and safe areas. It does not rotate panel pixels.
en-US.display.physical_note: Rotates output pixels and touch mapping only when the active display-output provider supports it.
en-US.display.physical_ready: Supported by the active display-output provider. Applying restarts the output briefly.
en-US.display.physical_readonly: The provider reports physical rotation as read-only.
en-US.display.physical_restarting: Rotation saved; restarting the display output…
en-US.display.physical_reason_provider: The active display-output provider does not expose this capability
en-US.display.physical_reason_readonly: The active provider exposes rotation as read-only
en-US.display.services_unavailable: Display services unavailable · controls are disabled
en-US.display.debug_note: Detailed sink logging and on-screen debug information are independent. Measurements remain read-only and never treat a configured target as a sample.
en-US.display.debug_loading: Reading display debug and FPS state…
en-US.display.debug_dirty_note: Cumulative since the display sink started; these are not sampled rates.
en-US.display.debug_restart_note: Changing detailed logging briefly restarts an active display provider. A stopped provider saves it for the next start.
en-US.display.debug_overlay_ready: Supported by the active display provider.
en-US.display.debug_overlay_unavailable: The active provider does not support configurable on-screen debug information.
en-US.display.debug_overlay_unchanged: On-screen debug information already has these values
en-US.display.debug_overlay_cancelled: On-screen debug information was not changed
en-US.display.debug_overlay_confirm_body: The display provider may restart briefly while applying the overlay. Continue?
en-US.display.debug_overlay_apply_failed: Could not apply on-screen debug information: {message}
en-US.display.debug_overlay_not_applied: The provider did not confirm overlay support; no change is shown as applied.
en-US.display.debug_cursor_note: Optional touch-point drawing for diagnostics. This is independent from detailed logging and the on-screen information overlay.
en-US.display.debug_cursor_unavailable: The active provider does not support configurable touch-cursor drawing.
en-US.display.debug_cursor_unchanged: Touch-cursor drawing already has this value
en-US.display.debug_cursor_not_applied: The provider did not confirm the requested touch-cursor state; no change is shown as applied.
en-US.display.debug_cursor_saved_restart: Touch-cursor setting saved for the next provider start
en-US.display.debug_confirm_body: The active display will briefly restart and Settings may reopen. Continue applying the debug-mode change?
en-US.display.debug_unchanged: Debug mode already has this value
en-US.display.debug_invalid_response: The display provider returned an invalid debug response
en-US.display.debug_reason_awaiting: waiting for the first real debug sample
en-US.display.debug_reason_measured: measured from the sink debug log
en-US.display.debug_saved_restart: Detailed logging saved; it will apply when the display provider starts
en-US.display.debug_applied: Detailed logging applied to the active display provider
en-US.radio.wifi.title: Wi-Fi
en-US.radio.wifi.note: Networks are supplied by a replaceable HAL provider.
en-US.radio.bluetooth.title: Bluetooth
en-US.radio.bluetooth.note: HAL controls radio power; the replaceable audio manager controls discovery and pairing.
en-US.radio.provider_missing.title: No {radio} provider
en-US.radio.provider_missing.body: Install or select a provider for the {domain} HAL domain. Settings will never show a pretend switch.
en-US.radio.provider_unavailable.title: {radio} is unavailable
en-US.radio.provider_ready.title: {radio} is ready
en-US.radio.no_devices: The provider is active but reported no radio devices.
en-US.radio.power_readonly: The selected provider does not expose a writable power control.
en-US.radio.select_device: Select a device to read its live state.
en-US.radio.bluetooth_scan_hint: Scan through the private BlueZ audio manager to find nearby devices.
en-US.radio.bluetooth_controller_not_registere: The Bluetooth controller is not registered with Linux Management; scanning and pairing are disabled.
en-US.radio.bluetooth_audio_stack_unavailable: The private Bluetooth audio stack is unavailable: {reason}
en-US.radio.bluetooth_no_devices: No devices found in 15 seconds. Put the headset in pairing mode, then scan again.
en-US.radio.bluetooth_discovery_unavailable: This controller has no usable Linux Management discovery channel.
en-US.radio.password_required: Enter a password for a new Wi-Fi network.
en-US.radio.password_invalid: Use an 8–63 character ASCII passphrase or a 64-digit hexadecimal key.
en-US.radio.forget_prompt: Remove the saved profile for {ssid}? You will need its credentials to connect again.
en-US.radio.persistence_saved: The network configuration was saved permanently.
en-US.radio.persistence_runtime_only: The runtime change succeeded, but wpa_supplicant could not save it permanently.
en-US.radio.no_wifi_body: The network provider is available, but it reported no Wi-Fi interface.
en-US.radio.wifi_control_degraded: Wi-Fi control is degraded; actions are disabled.
en-US.radio.wifi_control_unavailable: Wi-Fi control is unavailable; actions are disabled.
en-US.radio.hard_blocked: Bluetooth is blocked by a hardware switch.
en-US.audio.title: Audio
en-US.audio.note: Replaceable audio output, mixer and player controls. Bluetooth pairing remains on the Bluetooth page.
en-US.audio.not_loaded: Audio state has not been loaded.
en-US.audio.reason_stack: The private audio stack is not running
en-US.audio.reason_controller: The Bluetooth controller is not registered
en-US.audio.reason_no_output: No Bluetooth A2DP output is connected
en-US.audio.stack_not_loaded: Stack status has not been loaded.
en-US.audio.stack_unavailable: No audio stack state is available.
en-US.audio.select_hint: Select an output for mixer and player controls.
en-US.audio.player_not_loaded: Player settings have not been loaded.
en-US.appearance.title: Appearance
en-US.appearance.note: Wallpaper, accent, icon layout and launcher preferences.
en-US.apps.title: Apps
en-US.apps.note: Installed packages and health-gated uninstall operations.
en-US.roles.title: System roles
en-US.roles.no_migration: No display-output migration in this session
en-US.roles.migration_core_invalid: Core returned an invalid display migration response
en-US.hal.title: Hardware
en-US.hal.note: Devices, live state and replaceable hardware providers.
en-US.hal.inventory_partial: HAL inventory unavailable · provider controls remain available
en-US.ch347.controls_disabled: Configuration controls are disabled when the device or package state is unavailable.
en-US.ch347.saving_calibration: Saving calibration and waiting for the output…
en-US.ch347.output_ready: CH347 output restarted and is ready
en-US.ch347.restart_note: Restart stops and starts the supervised output. The screen may briefly go dark.
en-US.ch347.calibration_note: Calibration is stored in package state. Applying it restarts a running output.
en-US.ch347.confirm_touch_body: A running CH347 output will restart so the new touch calibration takes effect. The screen may briefly go dark. Continue?
en-US.ch347.confirm_restart_body: The supervised display and touch output will stop and start. The screen may briefly go dark. Continue?
en-US.hal.state_changed_body: Read the currently selected device before applying changes.
en-US.hal.changes_object: HAL changes must be a JSON object.
en-US.apps.select_inspect: Select an installed package to inspect it.
en-US.apps.uninstall_prompt:
Remove {package} version {version}?

Its running components will be stopped and Core must pass the catalog health gate. This operation cannot be undone unless the package archive is available for reinstall.
en-US.updates.rollback_concrete: Enter one concrete package id to roll back.
en-US.updates.rollback_prompt: Atomically switch {package} to its previous installed version?
en-US.updates.no_request: No update request has been sent in this session.
en-US.updates.title: Updates
en-US.updates.note: Signed updates, atomic rollback and recovery.
en-US.roles.migration_bad_response: Core did not return a valid planned migration
en-US.roles.migration_not_selected: The requested provider was not selected.
en-US.roles.migration_active_unchanged: The active provider remains unchanged until succeeded.
en-US.hal.select_device_hint: Select a device and tap Read to inspect its state.
en-US.hal.manager_not_running: HAL manager is not installed or not running
en-US.hal.read_editable_hint: Tap Read to load editable values.
en-US.hal.provider_conflict_reloaded: Provider catalog changed; reloaded before applying
en-US.ch347.configuration_not_provisioned: installed driver state is not provisioned
en-US.ch347.provider_not_responding: The provider is not installed or not responding.
en-US.ch347.frame_rates_applied: Frame rates applied: {fps} FPS, idle {idle_fps} FPS
en-US.ch347.touch_applied_running: Touch calibration applied; the running output restarted successfully
en-US.ch347.touch_saved: Touch calibration saved for the next output start

zh-CN.display.summary: 输出 {output} · 布局{layout} · {count} 个显示设备
zh-CN.display.services_unavailable: 显示服务不可用 · 控件已禁用
zh-CN.display.debug_note: 接收端详细日志与屏幕调试信息互相独立；测量值只读，不会把配置目标当作实测结果。
zh-CN.display.debug_loading: 正在读取显示调试与帧率状态…

zh-CN.display.debug_restart_note: 更改详细日志会短暂重启正在运行的显示提供者；若提供者未运行，则保存到下次启动。
zh-CN.display.debug_overlay_enabled: 在屏幕上显示调试信息
zh-CN.display.debug_overlay_ready: 当前显示提供者支持此功能。
zh-CN.display.debug_overlay_unavailable: 当前提供者不支持可配置的屏幕调试信息。
zh-CN.display.debug_overlay_unchanged: 屏幕调试信息已经是这些值

zh-CN.display.debug_cursor_not_applied: 提供者未确认请求的触摸光标状态；不会将本次更改显示为已应用。
zh-CN.display.debug_cursor_saved_restart: 触摸光标设置已保存，将在提供者下次启动时应用
zh-CN.display.debug_confirm_title: 重启显示以切换调试模式？

zh-CN.display.debug_saved_restart: 详细日志已保存，将在显示提供者下次启动时应用

zh-CN.apps.uninstall_prompt:
移除 {package} 版本 {version}？

其运行中的组件将被停止，并且 Core 必须通过目录健康检查。除非有软件包归档可供重新安装，否则此操作无法撤销。

zh.display.title: 显示
zh.display.note: 布局和输出保持可替换，不把桌面与具体硬件耦合。

zh.display.physical_loading: 正在检查显示输出能力…

zh.display.services_unavailable: 显示服务不可用 · 控件已禁用

zh.display.debug_loading: 正在读取显示调试与帧率状态…
zh.display.debug_dirty_note: 自显示接收端启动后累计；这些数值不是采样速率。
zh.display.debug_enabled: 启用帧率 / 脏区域调试叠层
zh.display.debug_restart_note: 更改详细日志会短暂重启正在运行的显示提供者；若提供者未运行，则保存到下次启动。
zh.display.debug_overlay_enabled: 在屏幕上显示调试信息
zh.display.debug_overlay_ready: 当前显示提供者支持此功能。
zh.display.debug_overlay_unavailable: 当前提供者不支持可配置的屏幕调试信息。
zh.display.debug_overlay_unchanged: 屏幕调试信息已经是这些值

zh.display.debug_overlay_apply_failed: 无法应用屏幕调试信息：{message}
zh.display.debug_overlay_not_applied: 提供者未确认叠层能力；不会将本次更改显示为已应用。
zh.display.debug_cursor_note: 用于调试的可选触点绘制，与详细日志和屏幕调试信息叠层互相独立。
zh.display.debug_cursor_unavailable: 当前提供者不支持配置触摸光标绘制。

zh.display.debug_cursor_apply_failed: 无法应用触摸光标绘制：{message}
zh.display.debug_cursor_not_applied: 提供者未确认请求的触摸光标状态；不会将本次更改显示为已应用。
zh.display.debug_cursor_saved_restart: 触摸光标设置已保存，将在提供者下次启动时应用
zh.display.debug_confirm_title: 重启显示以切换调试模式？
zh.display.debug_confirm_body: 当前显示将短暂重启，设置页可能重新打开。是否继续应用调试模式更改？
zh.display.debug_unchanged: 调试模式已经是此状态
zh.display.debug_invalid_response: 显示提供者返回了无效的调试响应
zh.display.debug_dirty_pixels_value: 总计 {sent_pixels} · 上次 {last_sent_pixels} · 上次 {last_rects} 个矩形
zh.display.debug_reason_pending: 配置尚未在运行时生效
zh.display.debug_reason_awaiting: 正在等待第一份真实调试采样
zh.display.debug_reason_measured: 数据来自显示 sink 调试日志
zh.display.debug_apply_failed: 无法应用显示调试设置：{message}
zh.display.debug_saved_restart: 详细日志已保存，将在显示提供者下次启动时应用
zh.display.debug_applied: 详细日志已应用到当前显示提供者
